acceptance_criteria.statement: Reviewer can verify: local-first operator state

value.text: Persist operator state only in the workspace-scoped local state store. Do not publish raw operator state in product artifacts.

candidate_gap_resolutions.statement: Define the exact enforcement mechanism for this constraint.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reviewer can verify: no automatic release approval

value.text: Require an explicit operator approval intent and a validated Platform approval decision before any promotion request or release action.

candidate_gap_resolutions.statement: Define the exact enforcement mechanism for this constraint.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reviewer can verify: The product must enforce `Block release completion until required follow-up verification`.

value.text: Block release completion until a durable follow-up verification record is linked to the required verification task.

candidate_gap_resolutions.statement: Define the exact enforcement mechanism for this policy.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reviewer can verify: The product must enforce `Escalate failed canary checks to the service owner`.

value.text: Create a service-owner escalation task for every failed canary check and require acknowledgement before the failure can be cleared.
